meta.tagline: The most epic WoW era, done right.
meta.description: Brazilian WotLK 3.3.5a server focused on quality, stability and fair play.

cta.defaultSubtitle: Download the client, set the realmlist and enter Northrend. The community is waiting for you.

home.seoDescription: Brazilian WotLK 3.3.5a server with Blizzlike scripts, balanced rates, active anti-cheat and dedicated community. Free and no pay-to-win.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.subtitle: From zero to login in minutes. Follow the steps and join the server.
howToPlay.seoDescription: Step by step guide to connect to Azeroth Legacy: download WoW 3.3.5a client, configure realmlist and create your account.
howToPlay.tips: Tips to Get the Most Out

cta.title: All set up?
cta.subtitle: Download the client and join the server now.

download.title: Download
download.subtitle: Everything you need to enter the server. Client, realmlist and instructions.
download.seoDescription: Download the WoW 3.3.5a client to play on Azeroth Legacy. Verified links via torrent, Google Drive and MEGA.
download.realmlistInstruction: After installing the client, open Data/realmlist.wtf and replace the content with:
download.launcherDescription: We are developing a dedicated launcher with automatic patch, pre-configured realmlist and server news. Follow on Discord.

cta.title: Client ready?
cta.subtitle: See the complete step-by-step guide to connect to the server.

rates.title: Server Rates
rates.subtitle: Each rate was chosen with purpose. Fast leveling, earned endgame, untouched legendaries.
rates.seoDescription: WotLK server rates: XP, drop, gold, PvP, professions. All explained and justified.
rates.philosophyText: The server was designed for those who want to reach endgame without weeks of grinding, but without skipping the merit. Accelerated leveling puts you in raids quickly, while legendary items maintain 1x rates — those are achievements to be celebrated, not purchased.

cta.title: Rates approved?
cta.subtitle: Download the client, set the realmlist and enter Northrend.

rules.title: Server Rules
rules.subtitle: Read carefully. Violations may result in punishments ranging from warnings to permanent bans.
rules.seoDescription: Server rules: conduct, anti-cheat, trading, PvP and communication.
rules.footerNote: Rules may be updated at any time. It is the player's responsibility to stay informed. If in doubt, contact the team on Discord.

cta.title: Rules read?
cta.subtitle: Now just log in and play with fair play.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about the server.
faq.seoDescription: Answers to the most common questions: how to connect, which client to use, rates, addons, anti-cheat and more.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.subtitle: Join Discord and ask the team directly.

status.title: Server Status
status.subtitle: Monitor in real time whether the server is online and current population.
status.seoDescription: Real-time status of Azeroth Legacy server.
status.note: Status data will be updated automatically when the server API is integrated.

vip.title: VIP — Support the Project
vip.subtitle: Convenience and cosmetics for those who want to contribute. No pay-to-win. No exceptions.
vip.seoDescription: Azeroth Legacy VIP system: benefits, prices and Free vs VIP comparison.
vip.whatIsText: VIP is the way to sustain the server. In return, you get quality-of-life shortcuts and exclusive cosmetic items. What VIP does NOT give: gear, stats, drop bonus or any combat advantage.
vip.footerNote: Benefits and prices may be adjusted as the server evolves. Always with transparency.

cta.title: Want to be part of the build?
cta.subtitle: VIP will be activated soon. Follow on Discord to be the first to know.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Track the server's progress and what's coming next.
roadmap.seoDescription: Azeroth Legacy roadmap: completed phases, current phase and next steps.

cta.title: Excited about the future?
cta.subtitle: Join Discord to follow updates in real time.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Discord is where the server really happens. Support, groups, events and decisions.
community.seoDescription: Join Azeroth Legacy Discord. Support, guilds, events, suggestions and everything that happens in the community.
community.sectionText: All official communication happens on Discord. It's where you find support, form groups, recruit for your guild and have a voice in server decisions.

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.subtitle: Your opinion matters. Send ideas to improve the server.
suggestions.seoDescription: Send suggestions to improve Azeroth Legacy.

bugs.title: Report Bug
bugs.subtitle: Found a problem? Help us fix it by reporting here.
bugs.seoDescription: Report bugs and issues found on Azeroth Legacy.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: News, changelogs, guides and everything that happens on the server.
blog.seoDescription: News, changelogs, guides and updates from Azeroth Legacy.

cta.title: Enjoyed the content?
cta.subtitle: Join the server or the community on Discord.

privacy.subtitle: How the server handles your information.
privacy.seoDescription: Learn how Azeroth Legacy collects, uses and protects your information.

register.subtitle: Enter Northrend and begin your journey.
register.description: Create your account on Azeroth Legacy and enter Northrend.
